name: Bulbasaur

name: Ivysaur

name: Venusaur

name: Scyther

name: Carnivine

name: Leafeon

name: Dwebble

name: Crustle

name: Flareon

attacks.effect: Attach a Fire Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Pokémon Catcher
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon with his or her Active Pokémon.
